user_query: I want to explore the world of NFT artworks and see a list of the most expensive ones available in galleries like SuperRare, MakersPlace, and Async Art.

TaskList.description: Query the gallery API for the most expensive NFT artworks available in SuperRare.
Query the gallery API for the most expensive NFT artworks available in MakersPlace.
Query the gallery API for the most expensive NFT artworks available in Async Art.
Compile the results from all galleries and create a list of the most expensive NFTs with their images and descriptions.
